dict.string: Lets the on-device assistant read your upcoming calendar events when you ask it to. Calendar data never leaves your phone.
Take a photo to ask the on-device assistant about it. Photos never leave your phone.
Lets the on-device assistant look up your contacts when you ask it to. Contact data never leaves your phone.
Lets the on-device assistant answer questions about where you are and the weather. Location never leaves your phone (weather lookups send only coordinates to open-meteo.com).
Voice input: dictate messages to the assistant instead of typing.
Lets the on-device assistant answer questions about your step count.
Lets the on-device assistant read and create reminders when you ask.
Transcribes your voice to text entirely on this device.
